abilities.description: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.
Create a token that's a copy of target creature card exiled with CARDNAME, except it's a 6/6 green Dinosaur creature with trample. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Create a token that's a copy of target creature card exiled with CARDNAME, except it's a 6/6 green Dinosaur creature with trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature card exiled with CARDNAME
